task: Make Day 1 training images and selected AI app installation guidance visible

governance_bootstrap.summary: Harness product changes must be mobile-first and verified against the actual user-facing experience before completion.
Code, deployment, UI, and customer-facing changes require real verification and completion evidence guard before reporting complete.

requirements.requirement: Existing Day 1 sessions should receive the new visual guidance.
